metadata.sourceName: NOAA NCEI Global Volcano Locations Database, Smithsonian-derived volcano locations
metadata.sourceNotes: Downloaded from NOAA's ArcGIS layer for Volcano Locations [from Smithsonian]. The layer contains volcano name, location, elevation, morphology, catalog status, last-eruption code, and country.

volcanoes.name: Campi Flegrei del Mar di Sicilia
